tool.name: MITOS
tool.description: de-novo annotation of metazoan mitochondrial genomes
tool.command:
mkdir outdir &&
runmitos.py --input '$input' --code $code --outdir outdir --refdir /home/maze/workspace/mtdb/data/ #if not "prot" in $advanced.featuretypes --noprot #end if #if not "trna" in $advanced.featuretypes --notrna #end if #if not "rrna" in $advanced.featuretypes --norrna #end if --finovl $advanced.finovl --evalue $advanced_prot.evalue --cutoff $advanced_prot.cutoff #set maxovl=float($advanced_prot.maxovl)/100.0 --maxovl $maxovl --clipfac $advanced_prot.clipfac #set fragovl=float($advanced_prot.fragovl)/100.0 --fragovl $fragovl --fragfac $advanced_prot.fragfac --ststrange $advanced_prot.ststrange
#if "zip" in $outputs: zip -9 -y -r output.zip output/" #end if

param.name: featuretypes
param.label: Feature types
param.help: Feature types that should be predicted by MITOS

param.label: Final overlap (nt)
param.help: Maximum number of nucleotides by which genes of different types may overlap

section.name: advanced_prot
section.title: Advanced options for protein coding gene prediction

param.label: BLAST E-value Exponent
param.help: Negation of the exponent of the E-value threshold used by BLAST, i.e. a value X gives an E-value of 10^(-X)

param.label: Quality cutoff
param.help: Minimum allowed quality in % of the maximum quality value per reading frame

param.label: Maximum overlap
param.help: Maximum allowed overlap of proteins in percent of the smaller feature

param.label: Clipping factor
param.help: Clip overlapping proteins with the same name that differ by less than the specified factor

param.label: Fragment overlap
param.help: Maximum allowed overlap of proteins in the query (in percent of the shorter query range) for two hits to be counted as fragments of the same gene

param.label: Fragment quality factor
param.help: Maximum factor by which fragments of the same protein may differ in their quality

param.label: Start/stop range
param.help: Number of aminoacids searched for start and stop codon of proteins
